sentences.english: Let's go over your annual performance review.
I've been looking forward to getting your feedback.
Overall your performance has been strong this year.
Your client retention rate is the highest on the team and you consistently exceed your quarterly targets.
sentences.korean: 고객 유지율이 팀에서 가장 높고 분기별 목표를 꾸준히 초과달성합니다.

sentences.english: Thank you. I've put a lot of effort into building relationships with our clients.
sentences.korean: 감사합니다. 고객과의 관계 구축에 많은 노력을 기울였습니다.

sentences.english: One area for improvement is cross-team communication.
sentences.korean: 개선할 영역 하나는 팀 간 커뮤니케이션입니다.

sentences.english: There have been a few cases where marketing didn't receive project updates in time.
sentences.korean: 마케팅팀이 프로젝트 업데이트를 제때 받지 못한 경우가 몇 건 있었습니다.

sentences.english: That's fair feedback. I'll set up a weekly status update email to all stakeholders starting next week.
sentences.korean: 공정한 피드백입니다. 다음 주부터 모든 이해관계자에게 주간 현황 업데이트 이메일을 보내겠습니다.
